response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of experience, strong TypeScript capabilities, and a solid foundation in cloud infrastructure. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions. While he has recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at Stripe, his lack of Python expertise, RAG architectures, and vector databases makes him a poor fit for this highly specialized Staff GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with a strong focus on system architecture, TDD, and CI/CD.
Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure deployments using AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
Recent, highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development at Stripe.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience developing AI-driven solutions.
No demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Lacks background in LLM evaluation metrics and AI observability frameworks.
